Tests if `Number.prototype` is an object and equals `+0.0`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the type and value of `Number.prototype`. It verifies that `Number.prototype` is an object and that it is equal to the numeric value `+0.0`. This assertion is likely used to ensure that the JavaScript environment conforms to expected behavior regarding the `Number` object prototype. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating a single property of the `Number` object.
